subcodes.first_line: O intimates of the court of the Beloved!  O adorers of the countenance of the Beloved!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عاکفان کوی دوست ای عاشقان روی دوست قفقازیا جمیعا تابع رود ارس است که در
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
